title: skopeo inspect should have a --format command like docker inspect does.
body: Would make handling the json easier.

comments.body:
I struggle to do this - https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo#not-todo
I don't see any gain when you could use other tools to do the same...but alright

No problem, I am fine with that also, although maybe give an example of another tool in man page.

I want to look for the Names label in an image.
other tools using skopeo can just unmarhal the json output, I added another example in the readme
